targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(grover_mean_ms) / NULLIF(AVG(bf_mean_ms),0)) || '×' FROM benchmark_quantum_results WHERE benchmark_type='timescale'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM arbitrage_signals WHERE ts > NOW()-INTERVAL '24 hours' AND method='CLASSICAL'
SELECT ROUND(grover_mean_ms / bf_mean_ms) || '×' FROM benchmark_quantum_results WHERE benchmark_type='quantum' AND n_nodes=32
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM security_events WHERE event_type='SQL_INJECTION' AND ts > NOW()-INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT
  bucket AS "time",
  open,
  high,
  low,
  close,
  volume,
  AVG(close) OVER(ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as sma20,
  AVG(close) OVER(ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 49 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as sma50
FROM ${interval:raw}
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(bucket)
  AND symbol = '${symbol}'
ORDER BY 1

WITH changes AS (
  SELECT
    bucket as time,
    close - LAG(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket) as change
  FROM ${interval:raw}
  WHERE symbol = '${symbol}' AND $__timeFilter(bucket)
),
gains_losses AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    CASE WHEN change > 0 THEN change ELSE 0 END as gain,
    CASE WHEN change < 0 THEN -change ELSE 0 END as loss
  FROM changes
),
avg_gains_losses AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    AVG(gain) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as avg_gain,
    AVG(loss) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as avg_loss
  FROM gains_losses
)
SELECT
  time,
  CASE 
    WHEN avg_loss = 0 THEN 100 
    ELSE 100 - (100 / (1 + (avg_gain / avg_loss))) 
  END as rsi
FROM avg_gains_losses
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute', ts) AS "time",
  SUM(CASE WHEN side = 'B' THEN volume ELSE 0 END) as buy_volume,
  SUM(CASE WHEN side = 'S' THEN volume ELSE 0 END) as sell_volume
FROM raw_ticks
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND symbol = '${symbol}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN side = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Buys",
  SUM(CASE WHEN side = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Sells"
FROM raw_ticks
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND symbol = '${symbol}'

SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute', ts) AS "time",
  SUM(CASE WHEN side = 'B' THEN volume ELSE -volume END) as imbalance
FROM raw_ticks
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND symbol = '${symbol}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute', ts) AS "time",
  SUM(price * volume) / NULLIF(SUM(volume), 0) as vwap
FROM raw_ticks
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND symbol = '${symbol}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  bucket AS "time",
  CASE WHEN close > 0 THEN ((high - low) / close) * 100 ELSE 0 END as spread_pct
FROM ${interval:raw}
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND symbol = '${symbol}'
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  price,
  volume,
  side,
  exchange
FROM raw_ticks
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND symbol = '${symbol}'
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 200
SELECT count(*) AS "trades" FROM raw_ticks WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour'
SELECT count(*) AS "total" FROM raw_ticks
SELECT count(DISTINCT symbol) AS "symbols" FROM raw_ticks
SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - max(ts)))::int AS "lag_seconds" FROM raw_ticks

SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute', ts) AS "time",
  count(*)::float / 60.0 as tps
FROM raw_ticks
WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  profit_pct
FROM arbitrage_signals
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND method = 'CLASSICAL'
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  profit_pct
FROM arbitrage_signals
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND method = 'CLASSICAL'
SELECT count(*) AS "signals" FROM arbitrage_signals WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' AND method = 'CLASSICAL'
SELECT count(*) AS "total_signals" FROM arbitrage_signals WHERE method = 'CLASSICAL'

SELECT
  ts,
  array_to_string(path, ' → ') as cycle_path,
  profit_pct,
  circuit_depth,
  method
FROM arbitrage_signals
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND method = 'CLASSICAL'
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', ts) AS "time",
  AVG(profit_pct) as avg_profit,
  MAX(profit_pct) as max_profit,
  count(*) as signal_count
FROM arbitrage_signals
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND method = 'CLASSICAL'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

WITH expanded AS (
  SELECT unnest(path[1:array_length(path, 1)-1]) AS asset, profit_pct
  FROM arbitrage_signals
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
    AND method = 'CLASSICAL'
)
SELECT
  asset,
  count(*) AS appearances,
  round(avg(profit_pct)::numeric, 4) AS avg_profit
FROM expanded
GROUP BY asset
ORDER BY appearances DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT
  count(DISTINCT array_to_string(path, '→')) AS "Unique Cycles",
  count(DISTINCT path[1]) AS "Assets Involved",
  round(avg(circuit_depth)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hops"
FROM arbitrage_signals
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND method = 'CLASSICAL'

WITH expanded AS (
  SELECT unnest(path) AS asset, profit_pct, circuit_depth
  FROM arbitrage_signals
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
    AND method = 'CLASSICAL'
)
SELECT
  asset,
  CASE
    WHEN asset IN ('BTC','ETH','LINK','SOL','ADA','XRP','DOGE','AVAX','UNI','DOT') THEN '🪙 Crypto'
    ELSE '💱 Fiat'
  END AS type,
  count(*) AS cycles,
  round(avg(profit_pct)::numeric, 4) AS avg_profit,
  round(max(profit_pct)::numeric, 4) AS max_profit,
  round(avg(circuit_depth)::numeric, 1) AS avg_hops
FROM expanded
GROUP BY asset
ORDER BY cycles DESC

panels.title: All Assets in Arbitrage Cycles (Crypto + Fiat)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ts,
  array_to_string(path, ' → ') AS cycle_path,
  profit_pct,
  method,
  circuit_depth,
  classical_ms,
  quantum_ms,
  graph_size_n
FROM arbitrage_signals
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.description: Both Bellman-Ford (CLASSICAL, blue) and Grover’s Algorithm (QUANTUM, red) signals. classical_ms = BF runtime; quantum_ms = AerSimulator runtime.

panels.title: 🔬 Quantum Engine — Classical vs Quantum Complexity

targets.rawSql: SELECT n_nodes AS "N", bf_mean_ms AS "BF (ms)", grover_mean_ms AS "Grover (ms)", ROUND(grover_mean_ms / NULLIF(bf_mean_ms,0)) AS "Ratio" FROM benchmark_quantum_results WHERE benchmark_type='quantum' ORDER BY n_nodes
SELECT bf_p99_ms FROM benchmark_quantum_results WHERE benchmark_type='quantum' AND n_nodes=20
SELECT circuit_depth FROM benchmark_quantum_results WHERE benchmark_type='quantum' AND n_nodes=32
SELECT n_qubits FROM benchmark_quantum_results WHERE benchmark_type='quantum' AND n_nodes=32
SELECT ROUND(grover_mean_ms / bf_mean_ms) FROM benchmark_quantum_results WHERE benchmark_type='quantum' AND n_nodes=32

options.content:
**Why is Grover slower on AerSimulator?**  
AerSimulator computes the full 2ⁿ-element state vector classically, producing **O(2ⁿ) overhead** per iteration. On *real quantum hardware*, Grover's oracle query complexity is **O(√N)** — a quadratic speedup over classical search. The divergence between the two lines in the benchmark chart is the research result: it isolates simulator overhead from the theoretical quantum advantage.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM security_events WHERE event_type='SQL_INJECTION' AND ts > NOW()-INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM security_events WHERE event_type='RATE_LIMIT' AND ts > NOW()-INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT to_char(ts, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS "Time", event_type AS "Event", client_ip AS "Client IP", endpoint AS "Endpoint", blocked AS "Blocked" FROM security_events ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 20
